CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_str String);
SELECT id, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(date_str) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE high_precision_dates (id Int32, date_str String, duration Float64);
SELECT id, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(date_str) AS parsed_date, duration FROM high_precision_dates WHERE duration > 1.0;
CREATE TABLE date_join (id Int32, date_str1 String, date_str2 String);
SELECT a.id, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(a.date_str1) AS date1, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(b.date_str2) AS date2 FROM date_join AS a JOIN date_join AS b ON a.id = b.id;
CREATE TABLE nested_query_test (id Int32, date_str String);
SELECT id, (SELECT parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(date_str) FROM nested_query_test WHERE id = t.id) AS parsed_date FROM nested_query_test AS t;
CREATE TABLE complex_date_test (id Int32, date_val String, category String);
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(date_val) != 0) AS valid_dates FROM complex_date_test GROUP BY category;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id Int32, event_date String, event_type String);
SELECT event_type, AVG(parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(event_date) != 0) AS valid_event_ratio FROM multi_table_test GROUP BY event_type;
